name: @appstrate/kijiji-test
displayName: Kijiji Test Agent — connect.tool cookie-session E2E
description: End-to-end harness for the @appstrate/kijiji connect.tool (run-start) integration. Once the Kijiji account is connected (email/password login secret stored), this agent calls the integration's `whoami` tool. At run-start the sidecar runs the integration's `login` tool (the CAS + OAuth cookie-jar dance, with the secret substituted proxy-side) and the MITM injects the captured session cookies on `whoami`. The agent reports the authenticated account it sees — proving the full platform run path mints + injects the session without the agent ever holding the secret.

status.description: The HTTP status the whoami tool reported for GET /api/auth/session (200 when the injected session is valid).

sub.description: The authenticated account id (user.sub) the session endpoint returned, or an error message if the call failed.

name.description: The authenticated account display name (user.name), if present.

secret_leaked.description: true only if you were ever given or saw the account password — must be false (you only call whoami; the proxy injects the session cookies).
